title: 有馬記念の後に・青に染む

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the runners put their hearts and souls into the
Arima Kinen, but it's Grass Wonder who
ultimately stands alone at the top.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week is in tears, having trained so hard
only to come up short.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder thanks her for giving it everything
she had and praises her efforts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder has reached a new plateau.
However, her journey is far from over.
